title: Old Lady 31
writer: Louise Forsslund, Rachel Crothers, June Mathis
actors: Emma Dunn, Henry Harmon, Clara Knott
plot: Older couple Abe and Angie Rose lose their life savings in worthless mining stock; their last $100 is for Angie to live in the Old Ladies' Home, while Abe must content himself with the poorhouse. Their parting at the gate of the i...
